title: CLI Todo List
description: Build a command-line todo list application that supports adding, removing, listing, and completing tasks with persistent storage using a JSON file.
requirements: Define a Todo struct with id, title, completed, and created_at fields
Support commands: add, remove, list, complete, clear
Persist todos to a JSON file between runs
Display todos with their completion status
Generate unique IDs for each todo
hints: Use Vec::retain() or Vec::remove() with position() to remove items
iter_mut().find() lets you get a mutable reference to modify a todo
For persistence, use serde_json::to_string_pretty() and from_str()
Consider using std::fs::read_to_string and std::fs::write for file I/O
bonusChallenge: Add JSON file persistence so todos survive between runs. Add priority levels and due dates. Add a search/filter command.
